arts.ttl: Paul Pogba to Man United transfer truth emerges as return stance clarified
arts.sum: Paul Pogba has recently been linked with a surprise return to Manchester United as he looks for a new club after leaving Juventus last year.

arts.ttl: Manchester United team doctor 'expected to join' rival Premier League club after exit of head of sports medicine Gary O'Driscoll was confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United 's team doctor is reportedly 'expected to join' a Premier League rival in another blow to the club's backroom staff.

arts.ttl: Old Trafford abuzz as Manchester United’s neighbours welcome new stadium plans
arts.sum: Local people are enthusiastic about regeneration, though some fans share Andy Burnham’s worries over where the money will come from Even on a freezing, rainy day with no match scheduled, the area surrounding Old Trafford in Manchester is abuzz with football fans from far and wide. Just a day since Manchester United revealed their plans for the new 100,000-capacity stadium in Old Trafford, there is a sense of excitement at the new proposals: the plans promise 92,000 jobs and a large-scale “regeneration” of the area, including 17,000 new homes. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd stars 'SHOCKED and OFFENDED' by brutal Ratcliffe criticism
arts.sum: The INEOS billionaire insisted that it would take time to undo the mistakes of the past and admitted that there are currently several Man Utd players who are 'not good enough' and 'overpaid.' Ratcliffe's comments have inevitably made their way into the Man Utd dressing room and journalist Graeme Bailey claims that some players, chief among them Casemiro, have been left'shocked' and 'offended' by the blunt criticism.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee get very different manager responses to Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United strikers Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee have both struggled for goals this season - but only one has been called up for international duty this month

arts.ttl: Mason Mount injury return can unleash £67m Man United ace who Ruben Amorim loves
arts.sum: Manchester United have welcomed Mason Mount back to team training for the first time this year following a three-month injury absence since the Manchester derby

arts.ttl: Man United's £2billion super stadium plans thrown into DOUBT - as industry insiders call into question Sir Jim Ratcliffe's bold statements
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Man United's grand plans for a £2billion super stadium have raised the eyebrows of industry experts who doubt key aspects of the eye-popping proposal unveiled this week.

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong to Manchester United transfer update as new stance emerges in £34m decision
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen star Jeremie Frimpong has once again been linked with a summer move to Man United.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Sir Jim Ratcliffe influence in full swing as Red Devils 'lead the race' for South American wonderkid
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly interested in signing Rosario Central defender Juan Gimenez during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Real Sociedad - Europa League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up against Real Sociedad in the Europa League on Thursday.
